creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153758
svn diff for sysutils/etcmerge

I've always hated mergemaster(8) so this looks
like a good opportunity to make my life, and
hopefully others too, nicer, and easier. :)

So I'd love to maintain sysutils/etcmerge

CHANGES
Makefile - takes MAINTAINER
pkg-desrr - modifies description, adds WWW

That's it!

Please find the svn diff, attached, to accomplish this.

Thanks!

--Chris
